title: Bloomberg BQL Query Result
description: The result set returned from executing a Bloomberg Query Language (BQL) query, containing columnar data with security identifiers, field values, and associated metadata.

queryId.description: Unique identifier of the query that produced this result set.

status.description: Final execution status of the query.

createdAt.description: Timestamp when the query was submitted.

completedAt.description: Timestamp when the query finished executing.

columns.description: Ordered list of column definitions describing each field in the result set.

data.description: Array of result rows, each containing a security identifier and its corresponding field values.

errors.description: Array of errors encountered during query execution, if any.

ResultColumn.description: Definition of a single column in the BQL query result set.

name.description: Column name, typically the Bloomberg field mnemonic (e.g., PX_LAST, PE_RATIO).

type.description: Data type of the values in this column.

description.description: Human-readable description of the column data.

units.description: Units of measurement for numeric columns (e.g., USD, %, basis points).

ResultRow.description: A single row of data in the result set, corresponding to one security.

security.description: Bloomberg ticker identifying the security for this row.

date.description: Date associated with this data point, present in time series results.

values.description: Ordered array of field values corresponding to the columns definition.

ResultMetadata.description: Metadata about the query execution and result set.

totalRows.description: Total number of data rows in the result set.

totalColumns.description: Total number of columns in the result set.

executionTimeMs.description: Time in milliseconds taken to execute the query.

dataAsOf.description: Timestamp indicating the freshness of the returned data.

truncated.description: Whether the result set was truncated due to size limits.

QueryError.description: An error encountered during BQL query execution.

security.description: Security ticker associated with the error, if applicable.

field.description: Field mnemonic associated with the error, if applicable.
